title: Training Programs and Standards. The Department, through the NMP,
content: 47 shall coordinate with private entities, government agencies and employers concerned in 48 the formulation of training programs and standards; provision of skills enhancement 49 trainings mandated and recommended by the international maritime conventions and 50 other capability building interventions that measure up to quality standards that respond 51 to the need of seafarers; and conduct strategic studies and research in support of decent 52 employment, protection of rights, and promotion of the welfare of seafarers, including the 53 empowerment of women seafarers, among others. 54 55 56 Code of Discipline For Filipino Seafarers 57 58
